name: Fancy Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 Large Half Breasts of Chicken, Boned (but do not remove the skins) - about ½ pound each
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken skin side down on a board and sprinkle with onion salt.
2. Pound the chicken lightly, being careful not to break the meat.
3. Place a strip of ham on each breast.
4. Roll up the breasts to enclose the ham and tie with string.
5. Place the chicken breasts in a 2-quart oblong baking dish.
6. Combine orange juice, liqueur, lemon juice, and grated orange peel in a bowl.
7. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
8. Cover the dish with wax paper.
9. Microwave at medium high (70%) until the chicken is tender, about 12 to 14 minutes. Spoon sauce over the chicken after half the cooking time.
10. Remove the chicken and keep warm.
11. Microwave the sauce at high (100%) for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes.
12. Remove the string from the chicken.
13. Pour the sauce over the chicken and serve.
14. Makes 4 servings.
